spec.expr: (sum(rate(scylla_storage_proxy_coordinator_write_timeouts{cluster="$cluster", dc=~"$dc"}[$__rate_interval])) or on() vector(0)) + (sum(rate(scylla_storage_proxy_coordinator_read_timeouts{cluster="$cluster", dc=~"$dc"}[$__rate_interval])) or on() vector(0))>0

spec.description: Write attempts - include all writes that reached the coordinator node, even if they will eventually fail
spec.title: Writes/s

spec.description: Read attempts - include all reads that reached the coordinator node, even if they will eventually fail
spec.title: Reads/s

spec.description: The percentage of the time during which Scylla utilized the CPU. Note that because Scylla does busy polling for some time before going idle, CPU utilization as seen by the operating system may be much higher. Your system is not yet CPU-bottlenecked until this metric is high.
spec.title: Load

spec.expr: 0*scylla_scylladb_current_version{cluster="$cluster", dc=~"$dc"} + on (instance) group_left() (scylla_node_operation_mode{cluster="$cluster", dc=~"$dc"}!= 3 or on (instance) ((scylla_gossip_live{cluster="$cluster", dc=~"$dc"}+1<  bool scalar(count(scylla_node_operation_mode{cluster="$cluster"}==3)))*6 + 3))

(sum(scylla_cql:non_system_prepared1m{cluster=~"$cluster", dc=~"$dc"}) by (instance) >bool 1) + (sum(rate(scylla_cql_reverse_queries{cluster=~"$cluster", dc=~"$dc"}[$__rate_interval])) by(instance) >bool 1) + (sum(scylla_cql:non_paged_no_system1m{cluster=~"$cluster", dc=~"$dc"}) by (instance) >bool 1)

(min(scylla_streaming_finished_percentage{cluster="$cluster", dc=~"$dc"}*100) by (instance) < 100) or on (instance) (min(scylla_node_ops_finished_percentage{cluster="$cluster", dc=~"$dc"}*100) by (instance) < 100) or on (instance)  0*sum(scylla_scylladb_current_version{cluster="$cluster", dc=~"$dc"}) by (instance)

value.title: OS Information Dashboard, an Error indicates there are OS related errors

spec.expr: avg(sum(rate(scylla_storage_proxy_coordinator_write_latency_count{cluster="$cluster", dc=~"$dc"}[$__rate_interval] offset 1d)) by ([[by]])) or on () avg(sum(rate(scylla_storage_proxy_coordinator_write_latency_summary_count{cluster="$cluster", dc=~"$dc"}[$__rate_interval] offset 1d)) by ([[by]]))

avg(sum(rate(scylla_storage_proxy_coordinator_write_latency_count{cluster="$cluster", dc=~"$dc"}[$__rate_interval] offset 1w)) by ([[by]])) or on () avg(sum(rate(scylla_storage_proxy_coordinator_write_latency_summary_count{cluster="$cluster", dc=~"$dc"}[$__rate_interval] offset 1w)) by ([[by]]))

spec.description: Write attempts - include all writes that reached the coordinator node, even if they will eventually fail
spec.title: Writes

spec.description: Requests that Scylla tried to write but timed out. Timeouts are counted in the node that received the request (the coordinator), not at the replicas.
spec.title: Write Timeouts by [[by]]

spec.expr: avg(sum(rate(scylla_storage_proxy_coordinator_read_latency_count{cluster="$cluster", dc=~"$dc",scheduling_group_name=~"$sg"}[$__rate_interval] offset 1d)) by ([[by]])) or on () avg(sum(rate(scylla_storage_proxy_coordinator_read_latency_summary_count{cluster="$cluster", dc=~"$dc",scheduling_group_name=~"$sg"}[$__rate_interval] offset 1d)) by ([[by]]))

avg(sum(rate(scylla_storage_proxy_coordinator_read_latency_count{cluster="$cluster", dc=~"$dc",scheduling_group_name=~"$sg"}[$__rate_interval] offset 1w)) by ([[by]])) or on () avg(sum(rate(scylla_storage_proxy_coordinator_read_latency_summary_count{cluster="$cluster", dc=~"$dc",scheduling_group_name=~"$sg"}[$__rate_interval] offset 1w)) by ([[by]]))

spec.description: Read attempts - include all reads that reached the coordinator node, even if they will eventually fail
spec.title: Reads

spec.expr: (sum(rate(scylla_storage_proxy_coordinator_read_timeouts{cluster="$cluster", dc=~"$dc"}[$__rate_interval])) by ([[by]]) or vector(0))+on([[by]]) (sum(rate(scylla_storage_proxy_coordinator_cas_read_timeouts{cluster="$cluster", dc=~"$dc"}[$__rate_interval])) by ([[by]]) or vector(0))+on([[by]]) (sum(rate(scylla_storage_proxy_coordinator_range_timeouts{cluster="$cluster", dc=~"$dc"}[$__rate_interval])) by ([[by]]) or vector(0))

spec.description: Requests that Scylla tried to read but timed out. Timeouts are counted in the node that received the request (the coordinator), not at the replicas.
spec.title: Read Timeouts by [[by]]

spec.description: The number of nodes configured in the cluster.
spec.title: # Nodes
